metadata.name: arcade-x
metadata.summary: LLM tools for interacting with X (Twitter)

functions.name: arcade_x.tools.utils.get_tweet_url
documentation: Get the URL of a tweet given its ID.

functions.name: arcade_x.tools.utils.parse_search_recent_tweets_response
documentation:
Parses response from the X API search recent tweets endpoint.
Returns a JSON string with the tweets data.

Example parsed response:
"tweets": [
    {
        "author_id": "558248927",
        "id": "1838272933141319832",
        "edit_history_tweet_ids": [
            "1838272933141319832"
        ],
        "text": "PR pending on @LangChainAI, will be integrated there soon! https://t.co/DPWd4lccQo",
        "tweet_url": "https://x.com/x/status/1838272933141319832",
        "author_username": "tomas_hk",
        "author_name": "Tomas Hernando Kofman"
    },
]

functions.name: arcade_x.tools.utils.sanity_check_tweets_data
documentation:
Sanity check the tweets data.
Returns True if the tweets data is valid and contains tweets, False otherwise.

functions.name: arcade_x.tools.utils.expand_urls_in_tweets
documentation:
Expands the urls in the test of the provided tweets.
X shortens urls, and consequently, this can cause language models to hallucinate.
See more about X's link shortner at https://help.x.com/en/using-x/url-shortener

functions.name: arcade_x.tools.utils.expand_urls_in_user_description
documentation:
Expands the urls in the description of the provided user.
X shortens urls, and consequently, this can cause language models to hallucinate.
See more about X's link shortner at https://help.x.com/en/using-x/url-shortener

functions.name: arcade_x.tools.utils.expand_urls_in_user_url
documentation:
Expands the urls in the url section of the provided user.
X shortens urls, and consequently, this can cause language models to hallucinate.
See more about X's link shortner at https://help.x.com/en/using-x/url-shortener

functions.name: arcade_x.tools.users.lookup_single_user_by_username

params.name: "The username of the X (Twitter) user to look up"
"User information including id, name, username, and description"

documentation: Look up a user on X (Twitter) by their username.
Users Lookup Tools. See developer docs for additional available query parameters: https://developer.x.com/en/docs/x-api/users/lookup/api-reference

functions.name: arcade_x.tools.tweets.post_tweet

params.name: "The text content of the tweet you want to post"
"Success string and the URL of the tweet"

documentation: Manage Tweets Tools. See developer docs for additional available parameters: https://developer.x.com/en/docs/x-api/tweets/manage-tweets/api-reference

params.name: "The ID of the tweet you want to delete"

functions.name: arcade_x.tools.tweets.search_recent_tweets_by_username

params.name: "The username of the X (Twitter) user to look up"
"The maximum number of results to return. Cannot be less than 10"

documentation: Search for recent tweets (last 7 days) on X (Twitter) by username. Includes replies and reposts.

functions.name: arcade_x.tools.tweets.search_recent_tweets_by_keywords

params.name: "List of keywords that must be present in the tweet"
"List of phrases that must be present in the tweet"
"The maximum number of results to return. Cannot be less than 10"

documentation:
Search for recent tweets (last 7 days) on X (Twitter) by required keywords and phrases. Includes replies and reposts
One of the following input parametersMUST be provided: keywords, phrases
